title: 'Artachshashta' #0783
definition:
Artaxerxes = "I will make the spoiled to boil: I will stir myself (in) winter"

 1) son and successor of Xerxes as emperor of Persia, 465-424 BC
nasbUsage:
Definition: Artaxerxes = "I will make the spoiled to boil: I will stir myself (in) winter"

 1) son and successor of Xerxes as emperor of Persia, 465-424 BC

    NASB:  a son and successor of Xerxes, king of Persia
